title: CodeGrind: Fresh DSA Practice with AI-Guided Play
summary: NewCodeGrind update: enhanced DSA practice with AI-assisted problem solving, refreshed UI flow, and updated problem filtering to boost learning momentum.
core_message: CodeGrind now emphasizes streamlined, AI-assisted DSA practice: faster problem discovery, real-time guidance from Azure OpenAI, and a clearer path from problem description to solution. The update keeps competition and progress tracking at the core, while improving authentication flow and user experience.
cta: Try the new AI-guided practice flow today and track your progress across the refreshed problem set.
visual_brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind problem editor with AI chat pane, a prominent DSA problem card, and a progress/profile panel. Cyberpunk-inspired but clean, emphasize problem-solving flow and real-time guidance.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
